title: Q screened alongside God Warrior Attacks Tokyo
display_title: Q screened alongside God Warrior Attacks Tokyo
wikitext:
[]: Q screened alongside God Warrior Attacks Tokyo             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Nov 09, 2012 9:20 am The fans are just as puzzled by this: http://neweva.blog103.fc2.com/blog-entry-1887.html Simultaneous in Japan? Something about that 6 minute preview? They can't mean worldwide I'd take it? EDIT: Fixed topic title and added information.

[]:             Quote Post by bobbyfischer's ghost » Fri Nov 09, 2012 9:29 am Something about a solider movie played alongside the preview of Eva 3.0. A worldwide Screening would be awesome though.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Nov 09, 2012 9:53 am Oh yeah, it does mention some other film being screened alongside Q .(A Movie Version of....something. Can't make out the title.) This is making folks in the comments wonder what the heck Q 's running time is.

[]:             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Fri Nov 09, 2012 9:57 am Sailor Star Dust wrote: Oh yeah, it does mention some other film being screened alongside Q .(A Movie Version of....something. Can't make out the title.) This is making folks in the comments wonder what the heck Q 's running time is.

[]:             Quote Post by Noriko is my wife » Fri Nov 09, 2012 10:04 am The other film is God Warrior Attacks Tokyo that was made for the tokusatsu exhibition. It's less than 10 minutes long.

[]:             Quote Post by Blue Monday » Fri Nov 09, 2012 10:06 am Q worldwide simultaneous screening; INSTRUMENTALITY HAS COME.

[]:             Quote Post by bobbyfischer's ghost » Fri Nov 09, 2012 10:10 am riffraff11235 wrote: Wasn't it established by an article a few months back that Q would run for about 120 minutes? Or was that just speculation?

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Fri Nov 09, 2012 10:20 am riffraff11235 wrote: Wasn't it established by an article a few months back that Q would run for about 120 minutes? Or was that just speculation?

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Nov 09, 2012 10:26 am bobbyfischer's ghost wrote: The runtime increased by 12 minutes between 1.0 and 2.0 so it's not much of a stretch for it to increase with 3.0.
